title: Zostel is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Zostel is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Zostel in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
